summary: Comprehensive testing of Day Learning AI upskilling platform completed. Backend API fully functional with 29/29 tests passing. Frontend UI working correctly with successful application submission and admin dashboard functionality. AI screening integration with Claude API working properly.

Application approval with invitation code generation
Student progress tracking and module management
Project submission and admin review system
Landing page loads with all required sections
Application form submission and success confirmation
Admin dashboard overview with analytics display

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor session management issue in admin navigation)
